title: ornithogalum sulphureum
intro: Ornithogalum sulphureum, also known as the Yellow-Flowered Star of Bethlehem, is a perennial flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Ornithogalum sulphureum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and other ailments.
